title: Minimum Operations to Convert Number
titleCn: 转化数字的最小运算数

testcases.input: nums = [2,4,12], start = 2, goal = 12 Output: 2 Explanation: We can go from 2 → 14 → 12 with the following 2 operations. - 2 + 12 = 14 - 14 - 2 = 12
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We can go from 2 → 14 → 12 with the following 2 operations. - 2 + 12 = 14 - 14 - 2 = 12

testcases.input: nums = [3,5,7], start = 0, goal = -4 Output: 2 Explanation: We can go from 0 → 3 → -4 with the following 2 operations. - 0 + 3 = 3 - 3 - 7 = -4 Note that the last operation sets x out of the range 0 <= x <= 1000, which is valid.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We can go from 0 → 3 → -4 with the following 2 operations. - 0 + 3 = 3 - 3 - 7 = -4 Note that the last operation sets x out of the range 0 <= x <= 1000, which is valid.

testcases.input: nums = [2,8,16], start = 0, goal = 1 Output: -1 Explanation: There is no way to convert 0 into 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There is no way to convert 0 into 1.
